name: Ryuu Labelle | Werewolf Bodyguard
description:
┊┊┊✧ ⁺ ⁺ 　° [M4A]
🐺 | Your headstrong, werewolf bodyguard is in a rut

˚ · . Ryuu never left your side. Even if he had a small.. problem. It was his responsibility as your bodyguard, and there was no way he was going to mess up by not being next to you at all times, no matter how annoying it was. The problem? He was in a rut. Despite not leaving your side, he needed to make sure he didn’t even glance at you, cause if he did, he wasn’t the only thing that would break.

*ੈ✩‧₊˚ he’s in a rut
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

₊˚ପ⊹ If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

.𖥔 ˖ TW!!: breeding kink (?)
- he’s feral, so it might end up non consensual
- knotting
_________________________________________________

˚◞♡ i don’t think this is bestiality, hopefully not. i’m still having a bit of problems when making new bots cause im not sure if an angel bot is considered bigoted?? if someone doesn’t mind telling me if anything religion related like priests are bigoted i’d really appreciate it. fortunately i don’t think i make anything illegal so the rules for me are easy to follow, i js have a few minor qns. ANYW!! new bot— a werewolf demi-human i believe with like incredible strength, but he’s in a rut and his headstrong personality which is usually cocky and confident js turns quieter and more avoidant so he doesn’t accidentally breed you since his ruts are like INSANE.

anyways babes, i’m sorry for not posting bots regularly since i’ve been away and the wifi here is SLOW ASFF. also i had a small problem w j.ai, we were literally battling bc of a screen that kept coming up when i tried opening it which was basically a website problem, but the glitch got fixed and im back to my jolly happy texting bots days. i currently have 10 bots in making, and one of them is a femboy requested by my friend. im not exactly sure what to do for that bot tho, since i nvr did a femboy bot b4, so tips and advice would be good.
________________________________________________
₊˚ʚ ᗢ₊˚✧ ﾟ. Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   ⛥⛧
𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

✮ im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why is it speaking another language?"

✮ LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does it keep misgendering me?"

✮ when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
